reasoning: SPY at 721.41 in premarket, gapped up +0.74 overnight and now backing off slightly from the premarket high (722.41). Price is sandwiched in a tight $2.07 band between the PML (720.34 support, 2★) and PMH (722.41 resistance, 2★). The battle level is 722.41 — a re-test and hold here favors bulls targeting the 5-day Carry high at 724.87 (+$3.46 above current); a break below 722.41 invites a retreat to 720.34 and likely deeper to the $716–$718 zone. Ribbon is MIXED (13¢ spread, no directional bias), but price holding in the upper half of the premarket range (+51% from low) supports modest bullish lean into the RTH open. Tight range, high uncertainty, but directional edge favors UP until 722.41 breaks.

primary.condition: if SPY holds 722.41 on RTH open test

secondary.condition: if SPY breaks below 722.41 in first 30 min

tertiary.condition: if SPY gets trapped 720.34–722.41 for 90+ min
tertiary.entry_trigger: none — range chop, defer to volatility expansion

key_observations: Overnight gap +0.74 shows up-bias into premarket; price now consolidating within PMH/PML band.
Ribbon is MIXED (13¢ spread) — no directional momentum signal yet; directional bias will emerge once one side of the $2.07 band breaks clearly.
PMH at 722.41 is the day's first critical test; holding here is bullish toward 724.87 Carry target; failure invites breakdown toward $716–$718 zone.
Tight $2.07 range limits confidence; any expansion beyond this band will define the day's bias.
